name: Weihai Guangwei Composites Co., Ltd.
summary: Weihai Guangwei Composites Co., Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells composites in China. It offers carbon fiber, fabric, and prepreg products; glass fiber preg; carbon fiber composite products; and other products. It also provides precision mechanism. The company's products are used in the defense and military sectors, such as aerospace, electronic communications, weapons, and other fields; and civil sector, including wind turbine blades, rail transit, nuclear power equipment, shipbuilding, major infrastructure construction, automotive parts and components, medical equipment, high-end sports and leisure goods, and other fields. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Weihai, China.
